background.description: Warm Sand / Bone-white for heritage, trust, and approaching the city's organic feel.

primary.description: Cubbon Green - represents trust, city heritage, and authority. Use for main nav and major actions.

secondary.description: Signal Traffic Red - for high impact zones, critical alerts, and 'Deploy' actions.

accent.description: Auto-rickshaw Yellow / Sandalwood - for moderate risk, highlighting features, and Gen-Z vibrancy.

display.usage: Hero headers, major numbers, KPIs. Bold, structured, modern.

body.usage: Case files, dense data, recommendations, general UI text.

typography.multilingual_strategy: For the animated 'Bengaluru' hero text, use a vertical rotating cylinder or cross-fade effect in Framer Motion where the script cycles seamlessly (Kannada -> English -> Hindi -> Tamil -> Telugu -> Urdu -> Malayalam). Ensure Noto Sans variants are loaded as fallbacks.

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Bento 'Control Room' Grid for dashboard (tight gap-4/6, strict hierarchy). Use Mode B from guidelines.
layout_and_spacing.journey_flow: Detect -> Analyse -> Decide -> Deploy -> Reflect. Implement a horizontal sticky step-rail in the dashboard acting as secondary navigation.
layout_and_spacing.container_padding: p-6 to p-8 for cards to prevent text collision. Mobile first: max-w-full to grid-cols-12 on desktop. Generous spacing for landing page.

re_visualisation_of_stats.Total_Violations: Use an 'Odometer' style rolling number animation. Add a mini sparkline behind it showing the trend over the last 24h.
re_visualisation_of_stats.Top_10_Ranked_List: Visual 'Danger Scales'. Each row has a progress bar where red signifies congestion density, along with a tiny spark-map (SVG) of the street layout instead of just text.
re_visualisation_of_stats.Severity_Distribution: Avoid standard pies. Use a 'Waffle Chart' or a 'Bento Grid' layout where area size equals severity percentage, colored in Traffic Signal Red/Amber/Green.
re_visualisation_of_stats.Hourly_Violation_Distribution: A continuous 'Traffic Wave' area chart with a gradient fill (React Recharts area chart with spline curve), overlaying sun/moon icons to signify time of day.
re_visualisation_of_stats.Density_Impact_Rank_Cards: 'Trading Card' / 'Case File' layout. Large typography for rank, accented by a 1px border. Use glassmorphism over a subtle map background snippet.

zone_details_panel.design: Slide-over right panel or deep modal. Header looks like an official dispatch (use IBM Plex Mono for timestamps). Avoid chart dumps; use natural language generation (Gemini) presented as a 'Briefing Summary' with highlighted keywords. Vehicle distribution as inline badges with icons.

motion_language.micro_interactions: Signal-light pulses for live markers on the Leaflet map (scale and opacity pulsing). Hover states lift cards slightly (-translate-y-1) with a soft shadow.
motion_language.scroll_reveals: Staggered fade-up for bento grid items using framer-motion (delay: i * 0.1).
motion_language.hero_animation: Sequential cross-fade for 'Bengaluru' in multiple scripts. Slow parallax on the hero background to give depth without distraction.
motion_language.transitions: Page routing should feel like shifting tabs in a control center (fast opacity crossfade, 0.2s).

iconography.custom_motifs: Traffic light icons, Auto-rickshaw silhouettes, Police siren minimal icon. Use as SVGs where necessary.

government_trust_signals.emblem: Use a minimal, monochromatic line-art version of the State Emblem or 'Department of Traffic' seal lockup in the header (opacity 60%).
government_trust_signals.classification_stripes: Diagonal hazard stripes (tiny SVG pattern) on the top border of 'Critical Zone' cards.
government_trust_signals.typography: Use uppercase tracking (tracking-[0.2em]) for overlines like 'OFFICIAL DISPATCH' or 'LIVE CITY FEED'.

hero_background.description: Chaotic traffic scene with auto rickshaws, to be used with a heavy dark overlay or crystal glassmorphism to show the 'stress' of traffic on the landing page.

vidhana_soudha_context.description: City street with large building in background, ideal for the 'About/Mission' page or 'Reflect' step.

police_officers.description: Police officers on motorcycle in traffic. Great for 'Deploy' or 'Action' sections.

auto_rickshaw_accent.description: Yellow auto rickshaw close-up, use for aesthetic break or card backgrounds.
